sources_freshness: 2025-2026 — DayakDaily/TE articles reference Q4 2026 operations. Milestones span 2025-12 through 2026-Q4.
evidence_quality_rationale: Three independent sources (2 DayakDaily + 1 The Edge) corroborate specific milestones. RM58M contract award and ART unit arrivals are concrete, verifiable events.
trackability_rationale: Active news coverage in multiple outlets. Specific, dated milestones with completion status. ART vehicle arrivals physically verifiable.
notes: Flagship tracker project. Strongest evidence package.

sources_freshness: 2024-2026 — Access road 97% complete (Aug 2024), ASEAN grid context (Jan 2026), Green revolution article (Aug 2025). No dedicated construction progress articles found beyond 2024.
evidence_quality_rationale: 3 sources but none are direct construction progress updates. Green revolution and ASEAN grid articles mention Baleh as context only. Access road article (2024) is the only direct Baleh construction source. SEB press office has no public press releases accessible.
trackability_rationale: Cannot track monthly/quarterly construction progress from public news. No SEB investor updates or media statements about Baleh since 2024 access road article. Impoundment milestones and turbine installation unverified.
notes: High PRESS score (19) is justified by scale (RM10B, 1,285MW) but actual tracking capability is limited. Best available public source is DayakDaily's green revolution/ASEAN grid features that mention Baleh contextually. Consider reaching out to SEB media relations for updates.

project_name: SCORE — Sarawak Corridor of Renewable Energy

evidence_quality_rationale: IMPROVED: Previously RECODA homepage only. Now has specific DayakDaily article (May 2025) with RM125B investment and 53K jobs figures — concrete, verifiable outcomes.
